tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent ~$94 est. (-5.5% Apr 22; last confirmed $95.42 TradingEconomics Apr 20) as Trump extends ceasefire indefinitely (Pakistan request) — extension averts Apr 22 expiry tail but blockade remains; Iran calls extension 'meaningless'. Stress scenario dominant (52%): stalemate extends without deal. Tail residual (33%): Touska retaliation vow unresolved. Hold Brent long at medium conviction — relief pullback to $94 is tactical, not structural; no deal, no Hormuz reopening, P&I remains suspended. Stop-loss: confirmed deal + Hormuz reopening (Brent sub-$88). Conviction medium.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent ~$94 est. (-5.5% Apr 22); ASEAN Energy Equities ~147 est. (-5.2%); ASEAN Banks ~175 est. (+2.9%). iTraxx Asia IG ~190bp (-15bp); ASEAN HY ~560bp (-25bp). Ceasefire extended but no deal, blockade intact — relief pullback is tactical. Maintain ASEAN Energy long (stress scenario $90-108 Brent); maintain ASEAN Banks underweight at reduced size (spreads tightening but 190bp still severely stressed vs pre-crisis 106bp). Tail (33%) still points to $130+ Brent and 220-240bp iTraxx. Conviction medium on both legs.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Reopen on Hormuz Re-Closure and Touska Escalation
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP ~58.40 est. (-0.5% Apr 22) as ceasefire extended; risk-on USD pullback. Ceasefire extension reduces immediate tail urgency — trim 3M NDF to half-size but retain USD Call/PHP Put 61.00 option overlay (cheap insurance given 33% tail). Blockade intact and Iran retaliation vow unresolved; full PHP recovery capped. Stop-loss: confirmed full Hormuz reopening with P&I restoration below 58.00. Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Rebuild on Re-Escalation
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR ~16,900 est. (-1.2% Apr 22); Indonesia 10Y ~7.18% est. (-10bp) as ceasefire extended, risk-on partial reversal. ICP overshoot ~$24/bbl at Brent ~$94 — fiscal pressure still significant. Hold IDR short at half-size; USD Call/IDR Put 17,500 strike retains value as cheap protection (tail 33%). Ceasefire extension reduces near-term tail probability but blockade intact — IDR recovery capped. Stop-loss at USD/IDR 16,600 (confirmed Hormuz reopening). Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia IG CDS Protection - Re-add at 205bp
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG ~190bp est. (-15bp Apr 22); ASEAN HY ~560bp (-25bp) as ceasefire extended. Trim CDS protection to three-quarter size on de-escalation — spreads tightening but 190bp still severely elevated vs pre-crisis 106bp; no deal, blockade intact, Iran retaliation vow unresolved. Retain Sapura / Hyflux paper short. Tail (33%) targets iTraxx 230-260bp; stress (52%) stabilises 180-210bp. Remove at confirmed deal + Hormuz reopening + spreads below 160bp. Conviction medium.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Rebuild on Hormuz Re-Closure
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM ~$19.50 est. (-3.9% Apr 22); TTF ~€44.00 est. (-5.4%) as ceasefire extended, partial de-escalation relief. Maintain JKM long at half-size — Asia LNG scarcity structural: Ras Laffan restart not before late Aug 2026 (The National), blockade intact, Hormuz not reopened. TTF counter-leg: maintain short as European spot premium compresses vs Asia. Stress scenario target $21-24 JKM; tail target $26-30 on ceasefire collapse. Stop at confirmed Hormuz reopening with P&I restoration. Conviction medium.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: iTraxx Asia IG eases to ~190bp (-15bp Apr 22) on ceasefire extension; ASEAN HY ~560bp (-25bp). Extension opens a narrow tactical window — execute any residual private placements now. This is a temporary tightening, not a resolution: blockade intact, Iran retaliation vow unresolved, tail (33%) targets 230-260bp. Do not wait for further normalisation.

Brent ~$94 est. (-5.5% Apr 22); THB ~33.65 est. (-0.6%); Thailand 10Y ~2.25% (-8bp) on ceasefire extension relief. PTTEP upstream EBITDA still strong; USD H2 2026 prefunding window briefly more attractive with spreads easing. Execute now — extension provides days, not weeks; blockade intact and Iran retaliation vow unresolved. Gulf JV sanctions-compliance review remains urgent given Touska seizure precedent.

iTraxx Asia IG ~190bp (-15bp Apr 22); USD/SGD ~1.2870 (-0.4%); Brent ~$94 est. as ceasefire extended. Working capital input costs ease modestly — use the window to execute revolving-credit expansion. Tail (33%) still targets spreads 230bp+; blockade intact; Iran retaliation vow unresolved. Maintain full USD hedging; reduce hedge ratio only on confirmed Hormuz reopening with P&I restoration.

ASEAN HY ~560bp (-25bp Apr 22); Brent ~$94 est. as ceasefire extended. Hyflux desalination power cost trajectory eases slightly but structural stress persists — 560bp is still severely elevated vs pre-crisis. Use ceasefire extension window to advance private-credit and quasi-sovereign restructuring terms. Tail (33%) pushes ASEAN HY to 620-650bp; do not delay on assumption extension implies resolution.
